rationale: Both correctly diagnose the None+1 TypeError from missing extended ratio tokens and confirm the hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml workaround, matching the thread. X more faithfully captures the thread's actual root-cause narrative — that PR #2713 removed the old 'modes' filtering so hunyuan_image_3_moe.yaml now unconditionally forces the AR stage on Base — while Y omits this regression entirely and frames it as a plain config/model mismatch, plus proposes a self-contradictory fix (silently degrade vs. fail-fast) where the thread only wanted fail-fast. Y's extra YAML-header claims add some unverified specificity that slightly undercuts grounding. Both correctly close out with the Gaohan123 follow-up-issue request.
